title: Vitax Tree & Shrub Planting Feed with added Mycorrhizal Fungi - 0.9kg Pouch
features: Q4 ROOTMORE Mycorrhizal fungi for intensive root growth
Provides the best possible start when planting
Boosts establishment of all trees and shrubs
description: Product Description A combination of essential nutrients and mycorrhizal fungi, for the best possible start when planting trees and shrubs. Ingredients Compound Fertiliser 4.8:7.1:9.5. Containing Magnesium with Trace Elements and Mycorrhizal Fungi Directions Apply when planting and use throughout the year for continuous feeding. Specific details not provided. Safety Warning May be harmful if swallowed or inhaled. Keep out of reach of children. Use gloves and other protective clothing when handling. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Do not use near food or feed areas. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and open flames. Dispose of container in accordance with local regulations. See more
